papers_mined.title: Pansori Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Korean musical storytelling: sorikkun (singer) + gosu (drummer); 3-mode flow sori-sung / aniri-spoken / ballim-gesture; chuimsae call-response with drummer + audience.

papers_mined.title: Pansori Korea Soulful Storytelling
papers_mined.note: 8-hour epic; sorikkun masterfully alternates 3 modes; gosu beats emotional circuit; chuimsae punctuates skillful passages, encouraging singer/audience phase-locking.

papers_mined.title: Five Pansori Masterpieces
papers_mined.note: Five traditional masterworks (Chunhyang-ga, Sim-cheong-ga, Heungbu-ga, Sugung-ga, Jeokbyeok-ga); each has fixed jangdan rhythmic cycle structure with phase variations.

papers_mined.title: Pansori Traditional Storytelling
papers_mined.note: Jangdan rhythmic cycles (jinyangjo slow + jungmori medium + jajinmori fast + hwimori very-fast); rhythm-phase determines emotional mode.

papers_mined.title: Probing Cross-modal Information Hubs (2605.10815)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: cross-modal information hubs in audio-visual LLMs.

papers_mined.title: Recent Advances in Speech LMs Survey ACL 2025
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: speech language model survey + speaker-listener dynamics.

papers_mined.title: SpeakerLM End-to-End Speaker Diarization (2508.06372)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: end-to-end speaker diarization and recognition with LLMs.
